headline: Is low domestic buying of UK stocks a problem?
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. investment bank Goldman Sachs Group Inc (NYSE:GS) has highlighted a significant valuation gap in U.K. equities, noting that the market remains "under-loved" and "under-owned" by both domestic and international investors despite a broader stabilization in global sentiment.
